title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s Son Emerges as Leading Choice to Be His Successor
summary_full: If Mojtaba Khamenei is chosen by Iran’s senior clerics, it may signal a victory for hard-liners, an analyst said.
summary_public: If Mojtaba Khamenei is chosen by Iran’s senior clerics, it may signal a victory for hard-liners, an analyst said.
